testcase.name: test_edit_item_rename_keeps_item_id

failure.message: AssertionError: Failed to create item: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_unique_item_edit_delete.py:107: in test_edit_item_rename_keeps_item_id assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Failed to create item: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create item: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_nonexistent_item_returns_404

failure.message: AssertionError: Should return 404 for non-existent item assert 200 == 404 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_unique_item_edit_delete.py:272: in test_delete_nonexistent_item_returns_404 assert delete_response.status_code == 404, "Should return 404 for non-existent item" E AssertionError: Should return 404 for non-existent item E assert 200 == 404 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
